name: Supply Chain Performance Scorecard
description: Executive KPI scorecard for Tales & Timber supply chain operations. Tracks delivery reliability, fulfillment efficiency, warehouse utilization, inventory health, supplier quality, and logistics costs across the distribution network.

goals.name: On-Time Delivery Rate
goals.description: Percentage of customer orders delivered on or before the promised delivery date
goals.notes: Measured from order confirmation to customer receipt. Last-mile delivery is primary bottleneck at 91% vs. warehouse dispatch at 98%.

goals.name: Order Fill Rate
goals.description: Percentage of customer orders fulfilled completely from available inventory without backorders
goals.notes: Partial fills counted as miss. Electronics category at 94% is dragging overall rate; grocery at 99.2%.

goals.name: Warehouse Utilization
goals.description: Average cubic utilization across all 12 regional distribution centers
goals.notes: Target is 85% — above 90% creates picking inefficiencies; below 75% indicates excess capacity costs. Seasonal peak (Nov-Dec) reaches 92%.

goals.name: Days Sales of Inventory
goals.description: Average number of days current inventory would last at the current sales rate
goals.notes: Lower is better (less capital tied up). Perishables at 5 days, electronics at 45 days. Target blended across all categories.

goals.name: Supplier Quality Rating
goals.description: Weighted average quality score for top 200 suppliers based on defect rates, compliance, and responsiveness
goals.notes: Scored 1-5 scale. Components: defect rate (40%), on-time shipping (30%), responsiveness (20%), compliance (10%). 15 suppliers below 3.5 under performance improvement plan.

goals.name: Freight Cost per Unit
goals.description: Average freight and logistics cost per unit shipped across all transportation modes
goals.notes: Lower is better. Includes inbound (supplier→DC) and outbound (DC→store/customer). Fuel surcharges driving current overage. Route optimization project targeting $0.08/unit savings.
